message:
fix: remove unused Condvar from elimination array and correct penalty scaling in SOS barrier

Elimination array cleanup:
- Remove unused Condvar field and import from Slot<T> — after switching
  to spin-wait matching, the condvar was dead code but still allocated per slot
- Remove corresponding condvar.notify_all() calls in match paths

SOS barrier penalty scaling fix:
- BETA coefficients are in milli-units but were being applied without the
  x1000 normalization needed to produce correct ppm-scale penalties/rewards
- Multiply BETA_1, BETA_2, BETA_3 by 1000 at point of use so the
  risk x bloom x depth triple-product lands in the correct magnitude
- Clarify BETA_4 comment: it is already in ppm, no extra scaling needed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
